page.title: Users
page.subtitle: Manage system user profiles, contact details, and account states in one place.
page.emptyDescription: Try adjusting the filters or create a new system user first.

filters.keywordPlaceholder: Search username, nickname, email, or phone

toast.avatarInvalid: Please choose an image file for the avatar
toast.avatarUploadFailed: Avatar upload failed. Please try again later.

dialog.deleteDescription: Delete user "{username}"? This action cannot be undone.

create.title: Create user
create.description: Enter the basic information to create a user

profile.title: Profile details
profile.description: Additional display information for the user

validation.max: Username must be 50 characters or fewer
Nickname must be 100 characters or fewer
Email must be 255 characters or fewer
Phone number must be 20 characters or fewer

password.label: Password
password.tooltip: Password must be between 8 and 72 characters

validation.min: Password must be at least 8 characters
validation.max: Password must be 72 characters or fewer
Bio must be 2000 characters or fewer

disabled.label: Disabled
disabled.description: The account is disabled and cannot access the system.

active.label: Active
active.description: The account can sign in and use the system normally.

locked.label: Locked
locked.description: The account is locked and requires administrator review.
